name: Groceries Dashboard
description: Full groceries management dashboard with tabbed navigation. Shows shopping list, stock, tasks, cart, and fridge categories via input_select nav. Uses Grocy todo entities and product image lookup. Based on production Grocy dashboard.

slots.description: Grocy stock todo entity (checking consumes product in Grocy)
Sensor with product image lookup array (id, name, image). Built via Node-RED from Grocy /api/objects/products.
Sensor exposing Grocy shopping list as structured attribute

notes: card_mod REQUIRED for background-image on button-cards inside auto-entities — styles.card silently ignored in template context
Jinja {{ must be on SAME LINE as {% for %} or red circle errors appear on all generated cards
All state_attr() calls in for loops MUST use 'or []' guard to prevent TypeError on unavailable sensors
display: block !important is mandatory on :host for scroll containment — without it scrollbar escapes to device level
Checking items in todo.grocy_stock CONSUMES the product in Grocy — this is destructive
Shadow DOM scoping required for todo-list input field styles: use ha-textfield: $: | scope, not .: level
Grocy image URLs use Base64 encoded filename via ingress path — direct /api/files/ URLs return 401 in HA browser
skeleton:
views:
  - title: Groceries
    path: groceries
    type: custom:grid-layout
    layout:
      grid-template-columns: repeat(10, 1fr)
      grid-template-rows: 50px repeat(9, 1fr)
      gap: 4px
      padding: 4px
    cards:

      # ── NAV BAR ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
      - type: custom:button-card
        entity: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
        name: Shopping
        tap_action:
          action: call-service
          service: input_select.select_option
          target:
            entity_id: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
          data:
            option: shopping
        view_layout:
          grid-column: 1 / 3
          grid-row: 1

      - type: custom:button-card
        entity: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
        name: Stock
        tap_action:
          action: call-service
          service: input_select.select_option
          target:
            entity_id: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
          data:
            option: stock
        view_layout:
          grid-column: 3 / 5
          grid-row: 1

      - type: custom:button-card
        entity: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
        name: Tasks
        tap_action:
          action: call-service
          service: input_select.select_option
          target:
            entity_id: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
          data:
            option: tasks
        view_layout:
          grid-column: 5 / 7
          grid-row: 1

      - type: custom:button-card
        entity: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
        name: Cart
        tap_action:
          action: call-service
          service: input_select.select_option
          target:
            entity_id: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
          data:
            option: cart
        view_layout:
          grid-column: 7 / 9
          grid-row: 1

      # ── CONTENT AREA — conditional per nav state ──────────────────
      - type: custom:layout-card
        layout_type: custom:grid-layout
        layout:
          grid-template-columns: 1fr
          grid-template-rows: 1fr
        view_layout:
          grid-column: 1 / 11
          grid-row: 2 / 11
        cards:

          # Shopping List
          - type: conditional
            conditions:
              - condition: state
                entity: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
                state: shopping
            card:
              type: custom:auto-entities
              show_empty: false
              card:
                type: grid
                square: false
                columns: 4
              card_param: cards
              filter:
                template: >
                  {% set items = state_attr('{{SHOPPING_LIST_SENSOR}}', 'products') %}
                  {% set pics = state_attr('{{PRODUCT_PICTURES_SENSOR}}', 'pictures') or [] %}
                  {% if items is iterable and items | count > 0 %}
                    {% for item in items if not item.done %} {% set pic = pics | selectattr('id','eq', item.product_id) | list | first | default(none) %} {% set img = pic.image if pic else '' %} {{
                      {
                        "type": "custom:button-card",
                        "name": item.product.name,
                        "show_icon": false,
                        "card_mod": {"style": "ha-card { background-image: url('" + img + "') !important; background-size: cover !important; background-position: center !important; border-radius: 10px; height: 80px; } "}
                      }
                    }}, {% endfor %}
                  {% endif %}

          # Stock
          - type: conditional
            conditions:
              - condition: state
                entity: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
                state: stock
            card:
              type: todo-list
              entity: {{STOCK_TODO}}
              display_order: duedate_asc
              card_mod:
                style:
                  .: |
                    ha-card.type-todo-list div.header { display: none; }
                    ha-check-list-item.editRow.completed { display: none; }
                    .divider { display: none; }
                    ha-check-list-item { min-height: 28px !important; }
                    ha-icon-button.reorderButton, ha-icon-button.addButton { margin-top: -35px !important; }
                    :host {
                      height: 580px !important;
                      overflow-y: scroll !important;
                      overflow-x: hidden !important;
                      display: block !important;
                    }
                  ha-textfield:
                    $: |
                      .mdc-text-field { margin-top: -28px; height: 50px !important; }
                      .mdc-text-field__input { color: white !important; }

          # Tasks
          - type: conditional
            conditions:
              - condition: state
                entity: {{NAV_ENTITY}}
                state: tasks
            card:
              type: todo-list
              entity: {{TASKS_TODO}}
              card_mod:
                style:
                  .: |
                    ha-card.type-todo-list div.header { display: none; }
                    ha-check-list-item.editRow.completed { display: none; }
                    :host {
                      height: 580px !important;
                      overflow-y: scroll !important;
                      overflow-x: hidden !important;
                      display: block !important;
                    }
